text:
Market today: The mood is mixed. Strong innovation and competition in the AI/chip sector are driving interest, but geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and potential supply chain shifts for tech giants add caution.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.06%) and SPAL (-23.1%) are leveraged and showing deep losses, requiring immediate attention. QQQI (-2.16%) is close to its stop at 52, which needs to be respected.

Watch: Closely monitor your leveraged positions for stop-loss adherence. Keep an eye on the broader chip sector given increasing competition and potential shifts in global supply chains.

Bottom line: Focus on managing risk in your leveraged holdings and adapting to the evolving chip market landscape.
plays: Consider trimming SOXL (-35.06%) or tightening its stop from 200, given its leveraged nature and significant loss.
Respect the 52 stop on QQQI (-2.16%); if breached, trim as scanner suggests.
Review your stop for SPAL (-23.1%), as this leveraged ETF can decay fast and amplify losses.
